_doc: Damage-calc whitelist filter — IDs listed here are removed from the baked public/damage-calc/equipment.json. Use to drop irrelevant items the calc shouldn't surface (e.g. unique boss-drop weapons that nobody runs in damage builds). IDs are stable across game versions: ItemTemplet ID for weapons/accessories/talismans (max-BasicStar variant), ItemSpecialOptionTemplet GroupID for sets, charId for EE.
